widgets.long_description: Renders a fixed text block in the flow.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: text_output
id: intro
text: Welcome to Steply

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

widgets.long_description: Displays a URL with an optional human-friendly label.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: url_output
id: docs
url: https://example.com
name: Open docs

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

widgets.long_description: Shows animated status text for background work or waiting states.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: thinking_output
id: thinking
label: Preparing
text: Resolving inputs

fields.name: base_rgb
fields.short_description: Base RGB color for the animation gradient.

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: peak_rgb
fields.short_description: Peak RGB color for the animation gradient.

widgets.long_description: Displays progress with optional range, style and transition settings.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: progress_output
id: build_progress
label: Build
min: 0
max: 100

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: transition
fields.type: { type: "immediate" } | { duration_ms: number; easing?: string | null; type: "tween" } | null

widgets.long_description: Renders numeric values as a small terminal chart.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: chart_output
id: cpu
label: CPU load

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

widgets.long_description: Displays tabular data without inline editing.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: table_output
id: summary
label: Summary
headers: [Name, Value]

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

widgets.long_description: Shows the difference between two text values.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: diff_output
id: diff
label: Planned changes
old: before
new: after

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: max_visible
fields.short_description: Maximum number of visible diff lines.

widgets.long_description: Displays task execution progress as a step-by-step log.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: task_log_output
id: task_log
steps:
  - label: Clone repo
    task_id: clone

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: spinner_style
fields.short_description: Spinner style used while tasks are running.

fields.name: steps
fields.short_description: Task log steps with label and task id.

fields.name: visible_lines
fields.short_description: Maximum number of rendered log lines.

widgets.long_description: Collects one line of text with optional validation and completion.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: text_input
id: project_name
label: Project name

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: placeholder
fields.short_description: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]
fields.short_description: Validation rules applied to the value.

widgets.long_description: Collects multiple string values as a list.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: array_input
id: tags
label: Tags

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]
fields.short_description: Validation rules applied to the value.

widgets.long_description: Focusable button that may trigger a task when activated.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: button_input
id: refresh
label: Refresh

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

widgets.long_description: Lets the user choose one option from a list.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: select
id: region
label: Region
options: [eu, us]

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]
fields.short_description: Validation rules applied to the value.

widgets.long_description: Choice selector rendered as navigable options.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: choice_input
id: package_manager
label: Package manager
options: [cargo, npm]

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]
fields.short_description: Validation rules applied to the value.

widgets.long_description: Interactive list component supporting single or multi selection.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: select_list
id: features
label: Features
options: [auth, api]

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: options
fields.type: (string | { description: string; title: string; value: string })[]

widgets.long_description: Text input constrained by a mask pattern.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: masked_input
id: phone
label: Phone
mask: \"(999) 999-9999\"

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]
fields.short_description: Validation rules applied to the value.

widgets.long_description: Numeric slider with configurable range and step.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: slider
id: retries
label: Retries
min: 0
max: 10

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]
fields.short_description: Validation rules applied to the value.

widgets.long_description: Picks a color represented as RGB values.
widgets.example_yaml:

id: accent
label: Accent color

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]

widgets.long_description: Confirms a yes/no choice in relaxed or strict mode.

id: proceed
label: Continue?

fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

widgets.long_description: Single boolean checkbox control.

id: accept
label: Accept terms

fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]
fields.short_description: Validation rules applied to the value.

widgets.long_description: Interactive date, time or date-time picker.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: calendar
id: deploy_at
label: Deploy at

fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]

widgets.long_description: Multi-line text editor widget.
widgets.example_yaml:

id: notes
min_height: 4

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]
fields.short_description: Validation rules applied to the value.

widgets.long_description: Runs one or more shell commands inside the flow.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: command_runner
id: install
label: Install dependencies
commands:
  - label: Cargo fetch
    program: cargo
    args: [fetch]

fields.name: advance_on_success
fields.short_description: Whether to advance the step on success.

fields.name: commands
fields.type: { args?: string[]; label: string; program: string }[]

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: visible_lines
fields.short_description: Maximum number of rendered log lines.

widgets.long_description: Interactive file or directory browser with optional completion.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: file_browser
id: project_dir
label: Select project directory

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: validators
fields.type: ({ message?: string | null; type: "required" } | { type: "min_length"; value: number } | { type: "max_length"; value: number } | { type: "min_selections"; value: number } | { type: "max_selections"; value: number } | { type: "must_be_checked" } | { type: "min_value"; value: number } | { type: "max_value"; value: number })[]
fields.short_description: Validation rules applied to the value.

widgets.long_description: Interactive hierarchical tree selector.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: tree_view
id: modules
label: Modules
nodes:
  - item: core
    depth: 0
    has_children: true

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: nodes
fields.type: ({ depth: number; expanded?: boolean | null; has_children: boolean; item: string })[]
fields.short_description: Tree nodes with item and depth metadata.

widgets.long_description: Structured editor for object-like values.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: object_editor
id: payload
label: Payload

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

widgets.long_description: Builds a snippet from nested interactive inputs.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: snippet
id: export_cmd
label: Export command
template: \"export NAME={{name}}\"

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: inputs
fields.type: ({ id: string; text: string; type: "text_output" } | { id: string; name?: string | null; type: "url_output"; url: string } | { base_rgb?: array | null; id: string; label: string; mode?: string | null; peak_rgb?: array | null; tail_len?: number | null; text: string; tick_ms?: number | null; ... } | { bar_width?: number | null; id: string; label: string; max?: number | null; min?: number | null; style?: string | null; transition?: unknown | null; type: "progress_output"; ... } | { capacity?: number | null; gradient?: boolean | null; id: string; label: string; max?: number | null; min?: number | null; mode?: string | null; type: "chart_output"; ... } | { headers?: string[]; id: string; label: string; rows?: string[][]; style?: string | null; type: "table_output" } | { id: string; label: string; max_visible?: number | null; new: string; old: string; type: "diff_output" } | { id: string; spinner_style?: string | null; steps: Record<string, unknown>[]; type: "task_log_output"; visible_lines?: number | null } | { completion_items?: string[]; default?: string | null; id: string; label: string; mode?: string | null; placeholder?: string | null; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; ... } | { id: string; items?: string[]; label: string; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; type: "array_input"; validators?: unknown[]; value?: string | null; ... } | { id: string; label: string; task_id?: string | null; text?: string | null; type: "button_input" } | { default?: string | null; id: string; label: string; options: string[]; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; selected?: number | null; type: "select"; ... } | { bullets?: boolean | null; default?: string | null; id: string; label: string; options: string[]; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; type: "choice_input"; ... } | { id: string; label: string; max_visible?: number | null; mode?: string | null; options?: unknown[]; reads?: unknown; selected?: number[]; show_label?: boolean | null; ... } | { default?: string | null; id: string; label: string; mask: string; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; type: "masked_input"; validators?: unknown[]; ... } | { default?: number | null; id: string; label: string; max: number; min: number; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; step?: number | null; ... } | { id: string; label: string; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; rgb?: array | null; type: "color_input"; validators?: unknown[]; value?: string | null; ... } | { default?: boolean | null; id: string; label: string; mode?: unknown | null; no_label?: string | null; reads?: unknown; type: "confirm_input"; value?: string | null; ... } | { checked?: boolean | null; id: string; label: string; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; type: "checkbox"; validators?: unknown[]; value?: string | null; ... } | { id: string; label: string; mode?: string | null; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; type: "calendar"; validators?: unknown[]; value?: string | null; ... } | { default?: string | null; id: string; max_height?: number | null; min_height?: number | null; reads?: unknown; required?: boolean | null; type: "textarea"; validators?: unknown[]; ... } | { advance_on_success?: boolean | null; commands: Record<string, unknown>[]; id: string; label: string; on_error?: string | null; run_mode?: string | null; spinner_style?: string | null; timeout_ms?: number | null; ... } | { browser_mode?: string | null; cwd?: string | null; display_mode?: string | null; ext_filter?: string[]; hide_hidden?: boolean | null; id: string; label: string; max_visible?: number | null; ... } | { id: string; indent_guides?: boolean | null; label: string; max_visible?: number | null; nodes: Record<string, unknown>[]; reads?: unknown; show_label?: boolean | null; type: "tree_view"; ... } | { id: string; label: string; max_visible?: number | null; reads?: unknown; type: "object_editor"; value?: string | null; writes?: unknown | null } | { id: string; inputs?: WidgetDef[]; label: string; reads?: unknown; template: string; type: "snippet"; value?: string | null; writes?: unknown | null } | { columns: Record<string, unknown>[]; id: string; initial_rows?: number | null; label: string; reads?: unknown; row_numbers?: boolean | null; style?: string | null; type: "table"; ... } | { fields: Record<string, unknown>[]; header_template?: string | null; id: string; item_label_path?: string | null; items?: unknown; label: string; layout?: string | null; reads?: unknown; ... })[]

widgets.long_description: Edits repeated rows using embedded widgets per column.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: table
id: envs
label: Environments
columns:
  - header: Name
    widget:
      type: text_input

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

widgets.long_description: Edits repeated items using embedded widget fields.
widgets.example_yaml:
type: repeater
id: services
label: Services
fields:
  - key: name
    label: Name
    widget:
      type: text_input

fields.name: fields
fields.type: { key: string; label: string; widget: Record<string, unknown> }[]
fields.short_description: Repeater field definitions with embedded widgets.

fields.name: header_template
fields.short_description: Optional header template for each item.

fields.name: id
fields.short_description: Unique widget identifier within the step.

fields.name: item_label_path
fields.short_description: Relative path used as item label.

fields.name: show_progress
fields.short_description: Whether to show progress for items.

embedded_widgets.long_description: Single-line text input usable inside tables and repeaters.

fields.name: placeholder
fields.short_description: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.

embedded_widgets.long_description: Masked text input usable inside tables and repeaters.
